use_cases: Display loading state during async data fetching operations
Indicate progress during API calls or network requests
Provide visual feedback during page or route transitions
Show processing status during form submissions
Maintain user engagement during background operations
ai_summary: A versatile loading indicator component with multiple variants including circular, classic radial spinner, pulse, dots, wave, bars, and text-based animations. Features size customization (sm/md/lg) with CSS keyframe animations for smooth visual feedback. Built with Tailwind CSS using a minimalist flat design with primary color theming. Exports individual loader components like CircularLoader for focused usage or can be used as a unified Loader interface.
